name: Howling in the Snow
rewards: You should now be ready to take on scenario 1 on the following page in the Scenario Book. Do not perform an Outpost Phase until you have completed scenario 1.

name: A Town in Flames
rewards: (Gain 2+X morale, where X is the number of City Guards still on the map.)

name: Ice Floes
rewards: Lose 1 collective Lumber for each set of five hexes with water tiles on tile 7-G

name: War of the Spire A
rewards: Remove all Fh-algox events from all outpost event decks

name: War of the Spire B
rewards: Remove all Fh-algox events from all outpost event decks

name: Thawed Wood
rewards: Gain 5 experience for each unrevealed dowsing rune

name: Change of Heart
rewards: Remove all Fh-algox events from all outpost event decks

name: Orphan's Core
rewards: Remove all Fh-unfettered events from all outpost event decks

name: Automaton Uprising
rewards: Remove all Fh-unfettered events from all outpost event decks

name: Uniting the Crown
rewards: Remove all Fh-lurkers events from all outpost event decks

name: Elemental Cores
rewards: Note the corresponding elements of the four doors that were opened

name: Invasion of the Dock
rewards: Damage any one even building between 71 and 89

name: Expedition North
rewards: Add the following Forgotten Circles items to the Frosthaven supply: 153, 159, and 161

name: The Collection
rewards: Or 2 inspiration if both brothers survived

name: Sinking Ship
rewards: Collectively lose 5xC/2 loot tokens (rounded down), first taken from HE-RO-IC-S' pile, then taken as evenly as possible from the characters' collected loot tokens. If any loot tokens remain in the HE-RO-IC-S pile, distribute them as evenly as possible to all characters. Loot tokens are then traded in for loot cards

name: Lurker Necromancy
rewards: Trade all numbered and lettered tokens in for loot cards

name: Radiant Dust
rewards: Spend any remaining dust to gain the following: Spend seven (once only): Scepter of Control Item #203 Spend one: Any 1 material resource Spend two: Any 1 herb resource

name: How to Lay an Ambush
rewards: Note the amount of remaining sun agates

name: Pirate Queen's Haul
rewards: Add one +1 sticker to a money loot card (the card gives one extra money token when resolved)
